description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux that runs on push to the master branch, excluding README.md, LICENSE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, and CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md. The workflow should build and test the project on ubuntu20.04 for x64 architecture in both release and debug modes. It checks out the repository and a submodule, installs dependencies, builds the project, runs tests, creates deb packages, and uploads the artifacts.
